messages.source: Get the most out of GitLens

pattern.text: 充分发挥 GitLens 的价值

messages.source: Discover the Benefits of GitLens Pro

pattern.text: 了解 GitLens Pro 的优势

messages.source: Streamline Workflow with the Home View

pattern.text: 通过主页视图简化工作流

messages.source: Commit Graph: See Your Code's Story

pattern.text: 提交图：查看你的代码演进故事
更聪明地提交，而不是更费力地提交

messages.source: Learn the why behind every code Line

pattern.text: 了解每一行代码背后的原因

messages.source: Manage all your work in one place

pattern.text: 在一处管理你的全部工作
GitKraken MCP
GitKraken MCP
欢迎使用 GitLens
为 GitLens 安装 GitKraken MCP
欢迎使用 GitLens Pro

messages.source: Get the most out of GitLens

pattern.text: 充分发挥 GitLens 的价值
开始使用 GitLens Pro

messages.source: The GitLens Community edition lets you track code changes and see who made them with inline blame annotations, hovers, and more—completely free.

pattern.text: GitLens Community 版本可让你借助行内 Blame 注解、悬停提示等功能跟踪代码更改并查看修改者，而且完全免费。
GitLens Pro

messages.source: With ${slot1} (Free 14-Day Trial), you’ll get full access to advanced visualization, collaboration, and built-in AI:

pattern.text: 通过 ${slot1}（免费试用 14 天），你将完整使用高级可视化、协作和内置 AI 功能：
登录
或 ${slot1}
提交图：

messages.source: ${slot1} visualize every branch and commit relationship

pattern.text: ${slot1} 可视化每个分支与提交之间的关系
可视文件历史：

messages.source: ${slot1} see how a file has evolved with a graph of what changed and when

pattern.text: ${slot1} 通过图表查看文件如何演进，以及何时发生了哪些更改
Launchpad 和 Worktrees：

messages.source: ${slot1} manage PRs and branches in one hub

pattern.text: ${slot1} 在一个中心管理 PR 和分支
GitKraken AI：

messages.source: ${slot1} writes commits, PRs & changelogs for you.

pattern.text: ${slot1} 为你编写提交、PR 和更改日志
打开 Launchpad

messages.source: Keep everything at your fingertips with Launchpad & Worktrees.

pattern.text: 借助 Launchpad 和 Worktrees，将一切尽在掌握。

messages.source: Stay in flow, ship faster, and never lose track of what matters.

pattern.text: 保持专注，更快交付，且绝不遗漏重要事项。
Launchpad：

messages.source: ${slot1} view and manage all your PRs and branches from one hub

pattern.text: ${slot1} 在一个中心查看并管理所有 PR 和分支
Worktrees：

messages.source: ${slot1} code, test, and review on multiple branches in parallel

pattern.text: ${slot1} 在多个分支上并行编码、测试和审查
集成：

messages.source: ${slot1} connect PRs and issues from GitHub, GitLab, Jira, Azure DevOps & more

pattern.text: ${slot1} 连接来自 GitHub、GitLab、Jira、Azure DevOps 等平台的 PR 和 Issue
连接更多智能体

messages.source: GitKraken MCP is active in your AI chat, leveraging Git and your integrations to provide context and perform actions. You can also connect MCP to other agents on your machine.

pattern.text: GitKraken MCP 已在你的 AI 聊天中启用，它会利用 Git 及你的集成来提供上下文并执行操作。你还可以将 MCP 连接到你机器上的其他智能体。

messages.source: Learn more in the Help Center

pattern.text: 在帮助中心了解更多
连接更多智能体

messages.source: GitKraken MCP is active in your AI chat, leveraging Git and your integrations to provide context and perform actions. You can also connect MCP to other agents on your machine.

pattern.text: GitKraken MCP 已在你的 AI 聊天中启用，它会利用 Git 及你的集成来提供上下文并执行操作。你还可以将 MCP 连接到你机器上的其他智能体。
注意：

messages.source: ${slot1} You may have a duplicate entry in your Cursor ${slot2} from a previous install. Remove ${slot3} to clean it up.

pattern.text: ${slot1} 你的 Cursor ${slot2} 中可能保留了上次安装留下的重复条目。删除 ${slot3} 即可清理。

messages.source: Learn more in the Help Center

pattern.text: 在帮助中心了解更多
安装 GitKraken MCP

messages.source: Leverage Git and your integrations (issues, PRs, etc) to provide context and perform actions in AI chat.

pattern.text: 利用 Git 及你的集成（Issue、PR 等）在 AI 聊天中提供上下文并执行操作。
了解更多
开始使用 GitLens
GitKraken DevEx 平台

messages.source: Supercharge Git and unlock untapped knowledge within your repo to better understand, write, and review code.

pattern.text: 强化 Git，并发掘仓库中尚未充分利用的信息，帮助你更好地理解、编写和审查代码。

messages.source: You also have access to the ${slot1}, unleashing powerful Git visualization & productivity capabilities everywhere you work: IDE, desktop, browser, and terminal.

pattern.text: 你还可以使用 ${slot1}，在 IDE、桌面端、浏览器和终端等各处获得强大的 Git 可视化与效率能力。
继续此引导
升级到 GitLens Pro
GitLens Pro
感谢你开始试用 ${slot1}。

messages.source: Complete this walkthrough to experience enhanced PR review tools, deeper code history visualizations, and streamlined collaboration to help boost your productivity.

pattern.text: 完成此引导，体验增强的 PR 审查工具、更深入的代码历史可视化以及更流畅的协作方式，从而帮助提升工作效率。
GitLens Community

messages.source: Once your trial ends, you'll return to ${slot1} — where you can still leverage features like in-editor blame annotations, hovers, CodeLens, and more.

pattern.text: 试用结束后，你将回到 ${slot1}，但依然可以继续使用编辑器内 Blame 注解、悬停提示、CodeLens 等功能。
升级到 GitLens Pro
${slot1}/${slot2} 个步骤已完成

messages.source: Thanks for installing GitLens and trying out GitLens Pro.

pattern.text: 感谢你安装 GitLens 并试用 GitLens Pro。
GitLens Community

messages.source: You're now on the ${slot1} edition. Track code changes and see who made them with features like in-editor blame annotations, hovers, CodeLens, and more—completely free.

pattern.text: 你现在使用的是 ${slot1} 版本。借助编辑器内 Blame 注解、悬停提示、CodeLens 等功能来跟踪代码更改并查看修改者，而且完全免费。

messages.source: difference between GitLens Community vs. Pro

pattern.text: GitLens Community 与 Pro 的区别
进一步了解 ${slot1}。

messages.source: Unlock more powerful tools with GitLens Pro

pattern.text: 通过 GitLens Pro 解锁更强大的工具

messages.source: With GitLens Pro, you can accelerate PR reviews, visualize code history in-depth, and enhance collaboration across your team. It's the perfect upgrade to streamline your VS Code workflow.

pattern.text: 通过 GitLens Pro，你可以加速 PR 审查、更深入地可视化代码历史，并增强团队协作。它是精简 VS Code 工作流的理想升级。
重新激活 GitLens Pro 试用

messages.source: Thanks for installing GitLens and trying out GitLens Pro.

pattern.text: 感谢你安装 GitLens 并试用 GitLens Pro。
GitLens Community

messages.source: You're using ${slot1} edition. Track code changes and see who made them with features like in-editor blame annotations, hovers, CodeLens, and more—completely free.

pattern.text: 你当前使用的是 ${slot1} 版本。借助编辑器内 Blame 注解、悬停提示、CodeLens 等功能来跟踪代码更改并查看修改者，而且完全免费。

messages.source: Unlock more powerful tools — Try GitLens Pro again

pattern.text: 解锁更强大的工具 - 再次试用 GitLens Pro
${slot1}，再免费试用 14 天。

messages.source: With GitLens Pro, you can accelerate PR reviews, visualize code history in-depth, and enhance collaboration across your team. It's the perfect upgrade to streamline your VS Code workflow.

pattern.text: 通过 GitLens Pro，你可以加速 PR 审查、更深入地可视化代码历史，并增强团队协作。它是精简 VS Code 工作流的理想升级。

messages.source: Learn more in the Help Center

pattern.text: 在帮助中心了解更多
继续此引导

messages.source: As a GitLens Pro user, you have access to powerful tools that accelerate PR reviews, provide deeper code history visualizations, and streamline collaboration across your team.

pattern.text: 作为 GitLens Pro 用户，你可以使用强大的工具来加速 PR 审查、获得更深入的代码历史可视化，并简化团队协作。
提示：

messages.source: ${slot1} To get the most out of your GitLens Pro experience, complete the walkthrough and visit our Help Center for in-depth guides.

pattern.text: ${slot1} 为了充分发挥 GitLens Pro 的价值，请完成此引导并访问帮助中心以获取更深入的使用指南。
打开主页视图

messages.source: Streamline your workflow — effortlessly track, manage, and collaborate on your branches and pull requests, all in one intuitive hub.

pattern.text: 简化工作流，在一个直观的中心轻松跟踪、管理并协作处理你的分支和拉取请求。
探索你的提交图

messages.source: Navigate complex repositories with a searchable, color-coded commit timeline. Instantly understand branch relationships, authorship patterns, and commit sequences.

pattern.text: 通过可搜索、带颜色编码的提交时间线导航复杂仓库，立即理解分支关系、作者模式和提交序列。

messages.source: Select multiple commits to batch operations like cherry-picking or generate AI changelogs with a single command.

pattern.text: 你可以选择多个提交来批量执行如 cherry-pick 之类的操作，或通过一条命令生成 AI 更改日志。
使用 AI 编排提交

messages.source: Let AI handle the heavy lifting - from turning your changes into clear, logical commits to getting context on others' work. GitLens’s AI features make reviews efficient and keep your history clean.

pattern.text: 让 AI 处理繁重工作，从将你的更改整理为清晰、连贯的提交，到获取他人工作的上下文。GitLens 的 AI 功能可让审查更高效，并保持提交历史整洁。
配置你偏好的 AI 提供商

messages.source: Stay in control. Review and edit AI suggestions before finalizing, and ${slot1} and model to fit your needs.

pattern.text: 保持掌控。在最终确定前先审阅并编辑 AI 建议，并 ${slot1} 和模型以满足你的需求。
自动编排提交：

messages.source: ${slot1} instantly generate a sequence of commits with descriptive summaries in an interactive editor

pattern.text: ${slot1} 在交互式编辑器中即时生成一组带描述性摘要的提交
解释提交和分支：

messages.source: ${slot1} understand changes without wasting time diving into the diffs

pattern.text: ${slot1} 无需花时间钻研 diff 也能理解更改
创建 PR 标题和描述：
${slot1} 每次审查可为审阅者节省 10 分钟以上
配置行内 Blame

messages.source: See who changed a line, when and why — without leaving your editor.

pattern.text: 无需离开编辑器，即可查看是谁在何时、为何修改了某一行。
将鼠标悬停在 Blame 注解上即可：
查看之前的文件修订
打开关联的 PR

messages.source: Jump to commits in the Graph

pattern.text: 跳转到提交图中的提交
与先前版本进行比较
